title: Vehicle tonneau bed open-close instrument
abstract: Vehicle tonneau bed open-close instrument composes of upper open-close part for open-close cover with vehicle tonneau bed. The part composes of edge attaching base which is base that is to attach with inner edge of vehicle tonneau bed, and support the attaching of inside swing base connected between inside cover base that equipped with inner cover. Part of inside cover base contains of inside moving supported base for supporting the installation of upper side of inside moving forth-back base for letting the lower part of inside moving forth- back base being transmitted the driving force inside gear, while part of transmitted gear from inside motor through inside transmitted wire. Another part of inside cover base contains of outside cover base which attached with outside cover for being transmitted the driving force from outside motor through outside transmitted wire for transmitting the driving force to outside transmitted gear to drive together with lower part of outside up-down base. The upper part of outside up-down base is attached with part of outside cover base directly or via additional outside cover base.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. Vehicle tonneau bed open-close instrument composes of upper open- close part (1) for open-close with vehicle tonneau bed (2) which composes of edge holding platform (3) that is holding plate or holding base or holding structure placed in distance at least two base for holding with inside side edge (4) of vehicle tonneau bed (2), which Outer surface or side edge of edge holding platform (3) contains of inside sway holding base (5) which is holding plate or holding base or holding structure and part of it is attached with bended curve for bringing one side hold with edge holding base (3) and bringing hold with inside swaying base (6). The attaching between inside sway holding base (5) and inside swaying base (6) is in the way that they are able to sway forth-back, which Inside swaying base (6) is holding plate or holding base or holding structure of which its one side is attached with one side of inside sway holding base (5) for combining with inside cover holding structure (7) at least one base, which Inside cover holding structure (7) is holding base structure that is combined together for forming one part to connect with inside swaying base (6) and enable for attaching with inside cover (8) at least one plate, and Another part of inside cover holding structure (7), there is lower power transmitting base for support the attaching with inside gear for being transmitted driving force from inside driving gear (14) which Inside driving gear (14) is the structure of which its inside contains of gear with the part extending outside attached with driving spin part for transmitting force to inside transmitted gear while part of transmitted gear is being transmitted from inside motor (15) by inside transmitted wire (16), and Another part of inside cover holding structure (7) contains of outside cover holding structure (23) which is combined structure of which its part is connected 

 with outside cover (25) at least one cover attached, for being transmitted the driving force from outside driving gear (17), which Outside driving gear (17) is the structure of which its inside contains of gear being transmitted from outside motor (18) by outside transmitted wire (19) for transmitting driving force to outside transmitted gear (20) which is attached with outside moving base (21), which Outside moving base (21) is stick or holder with inside cover holding structure (7) for support the attaching of outside transmitted gear (20) Its special characteristics is Part of inside cover holding structure (7) is moving support rail (9) which is moving support groove or moving support rail for supporting with the attaching of upper part of inside forth-back moving part (10), which Inside forth-back moving part (10) is moving plate or moving structure in straight direction or with curve in some part. It needs at least two part to combine and taking upper part attached with moving support groove or moving support rail directly or attached with inside holding support (1 1) for moving forth-back and support open-close function of inside cover holding structure (7) while lower part of inside forth-back (10) is attached with lower power base (12), which Lower power base (12) is stick or tube connecting with outside of inside sway holding base (5) for attached with lower part of inside forth-back moving part (10) for being transmitted driving force from inside driving gear (14) to drive inside cover holding structure (7) to open-close, and Outside moving base (21 ) is supported for being attached with outside up- down swaying platform (22) for transmitting torsion from outside transmitted gear (20) to outside up-down swaying platform (22), which Outside up-down swaying platform (22) is plate or structure that is bendable in at least one curve of which its lower part combining with outside of outside moving base (21 ) and providing the upper part connected with part of outside cover holding structure (23) directly or via outside support cover platform (24), which 

 Outside support cover platform (24) is plate or structure that is bendable in at least one curve for support the connecting between outside up-down swaying platform (22) and outside cover holding structure (23). 2. Vehicle tonneau bed open-close instrument according to claim 1, between of inside cover holding structure (7) and outside support cover platform (24), there contains of outside support cover holding platform (26) which is plate or structure that is bendable in at least one curve for being additional support when outside cover holding structure (23) is moving forth-back. 3. Vehicle tonneau bed open-close instrument according to claims 1 -2, whichever claimer, between the combining of inside cover holding structure (7) and outside up-down swaying platform (22), there contains of outside spring coil (27) attached in the way that it is able to move along the torsion or release itself when there is no torsion against for making outside cover holding structure (23) could move forth-back smoothly.
